## Related issues

<!-- How did you verify this change? Commands, screenshots, before/after, etc. -->

## Reviewer notes

<!-- Anything reviewers should pay particular attention to? Tricky bits? Trade-offs you considered? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format
- [ ] I have read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, credentials, or PII
- [ ] My change is focused and reasonably small (< ~400 lines diff), or I have explained why a larger PR is necessary above
